chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1704 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 03.04.2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Departmental Appeal / Representation filed by the Petitioner before the Respondent No.2, has not yet been decided; whereas, the Departmental Appeal preferred by other employees has been decided by the Respondents. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant AG Sindh present in Court in some other matters waives the notice of this Petition and submits that Respondent No.2 will decide the Departmental Appeal / Representation of the Petitioner (if pending) within a shortest possible time. In the circumstances, this Petition is disposed of with direction to Respondent No.2 to decide the Departmental Appeal / Representation of the Petitioner (if pending) within a period of 60 (sixty) days from this order. Copy of this order be communicated to learned Additional AG as well as to Respondent No.2 by fax for compliance. Judge Judge ARBROHI
